creator: bdodson@scms.utmb.EDU
text:
The Mesa port does not compile.  Failure mode below.

How-To-Repeat: 
XFree86 version installed: XFree86-4.0.3_3

Have
XFREE86_VERSION=4
in /etc/make.conf

Did a fresh cvsup of ports, but the same error occurred with a ports cvsup
contemporaneous with the OS version shown below.

[wotan:bdodson:16] make
===>  Extracting for Mesa-3.4.1
